recent_calls.summary: The call was initiated by the user but ended abruptly without any interaction or information provided. The agent requested the ZIP code for the service address, but the user did not respond before hanging up.

The user called to confirm if a technician was still scheduled to arrive this evening. The agent explained that confirmation couldn't be provided after hours but assured the user's request would be prioritized and someone would contact them soon. The agent also asked for the type of service and a description of the issue.
The call was very brief with the user only saying "C g" and the agent greeting the user twice. No meaningful conversation or assistance took place before the user hung up.

The user called after hours to inquire about the time of their appointment scheduled for tomorrow. The agent informed the user that they could not access the live schedule and advised that the team would confirm the appointment details when they returned at 8 AM. The call ended politely with no further requests from the user.

The user, Manikandan, called after hours requesting to speak with Gigi about a code "Egypt" related to their heating and cooling system. The agent documented the request and informed the user that someone from the team will call back on the next business day. The call ended with no further requests from the user.

Barbara Bennett called to schedule a service appointment for her heat pump, which is not cooling again despite previous repairs. She requested a technician visit tomorrow around 11 or 12 o'clock and expressed concern about recurring issues over two years. The agent confirmed the details and the appointment was successfully scheduled.

Tracey called to return CJ's phone call and requested to set up an appointment with a callback as soon as possible. The agent informed her that since it was after hours, CJ or someone from the team would call her back the next business day to arrange the appointment. The call ended with no further assistance needed.

The user called to cancel and reschedule an air conditioning inspection appointment due to a work conflict. They requested to reschedule the appointment to Thursday at 1 PM and confirmed it was a routine inspection. The agent noted the details and planned to have the team follow up to confirm the new appointment time.

The user, Haley, called after hours to reschedule an appointment to Thursday at 1 PM regarding the circuit breaker box and to cancel an inspection scheduled for tomorrow. The agent documented the requests and informed Haley that a team member would follow up on the next business day. The call ended with no further requests from Haley.
The call was very brief, with the agent greeting the user and no further interaction before the user hung up.
The agent greeted the user and asked for the service address ZIP code, but the user hung up shortly after without responding.

The user informed the agent about the scheduling details for furnace service on the thirteenth and mentioned her daughter would be present but arriving late. The user requested to speak with a live person, and the agent transferred the call accordingly.
The user called and requested to speak with Nicole. The agent attempted to connect the user and successfully transferred the call to another agent.

The user, Keith Starry, scheduled routine preventative maintenance for two air conditioners at his home in Weldon Spring, MO, for Thursday afternoon at 12 PM. The agent confirmed the booking details, addressed the user's feedback positively, and completed the appointment booking successfully.

The user, Hannah, called to report an issue with her air conditioning not working and not responding to the thermostat. The agent confirmed the dispatch number, updated the user's phone number and service address, and noted the preference for texting. The user declined additional information about maintenance programs and provided positive feedback on the call experience.

Anne from Home Shield called on behalf of a member to inquire about a canceled cooling system recall. The agent confirmed the details, including the service address and contact information, and scheduled the soonest available appointment. The user provided positive feedback about the call experience.
The call was very brief and ended abruptly after the agent's initial greeting and request for the user's ZIP code. The user hung up without responding.

Jeff called to schedule an emergency service appointment for his broken heating and cooling systems covered by American Home Shield. The agent confirmed the dispatch number, service address, and contact information, and Jeff declined to provide feedback. The call ended with the agent confirming all details and no further action requested by Jeff.

The user called to request repair service for their air conditioner, which is not cooling. The agent collected the reference number and transferred the call to a live representative for further assistance.

The user called to dispatch a service request for a gas furnace and water heater issue and sought confirmation about a canceled plumbing work order. The agent noted the details and assured a callback for clarification. The user declined information about maintenance programs and provided positive feedback on the interaction.
The user called to follow up on a dispatch because the technician had not arrived yet. The agent confirmed the service location and then transferred the call to a live agent for further assistance.

The user, Dr. Macklin, the building principal at Hazelwood Central High School, invited the agent to a community night event on May 7th from 5 to 6:30 PM to showcase student and teacher work. The call was brief and ended with the user leaving a message.

Sheldon Coole called to schedule seasonal maintenance for his air conditioner and furnace installed two years ago. The agent collected contact details and service address but was unable to provide appointment slots, so the call was transferred to a live agent for scheduling. The user expressed some frustration with the AI interaction and requested a callback from a human agent.

The user called to inquire about a spring cleaning service for their HVAC air conditioning. The AI agent clarified the request and determined it was a non-emergency, then transferred the call to a human agent for further assistance.

Kyle Dewitt called to check on the status of his technician appointment. The agent confirmed the appointment details and then transferred Kyle to a live representative upon his request. The call ended with a successful transfer to another agent.
The user was hostile and ended the call abruptly after a brief exchange with the agent. No service or information was provided during the call.
The call was very brief and ended immediately after the agent's initial greeting and request for the user's ZIP code. The user did not respond before hanging up.

The user called to check the status of a scheduled water heater service for a leaking outlet pipe. The agent confirmed the details and assured the user that the team would follow up with an update. The user declined information about maintenance programs and providing feedback.

The user called to provide a home warranty dispatch number and mentioned a previous conversation about heating and cooling service. The agent requested more details, but the user asked to speak to a live person. The call was then transferred to another agent for further assistance.

The user called to follow up on a missed call regarding a cooling service appointment and was waiting for a confirmation for a Friday 2 PM appointment. The agent confirmed details and then transferred the user to a live representative for further assistance.

Carolyn called to report that her furnace temperature was rising unexpectedly and requested a service appointment for Tuesday morning around 10 or 11 AM. The agent confirmed the details and informed Carolyn that a human agent would follow up to confirm availability. The call ended with the user satisfied and the appointment request recorded.

Sam from American Home Shield called Sophie at Budget regarding a dispatch and asked for permission to proceed. Sophie acknowledged and invited Sam to continue, but the call ended shortly after without further discussion.

Michael called Budget to report a leaking filter dryer on his cooling unit, which is under warranty. The agent gathered details about the issue, preferred service times, and confirmed the information with Michael. Michael declined information about maintenance programs and feedback, and the call ended with a promise of follow-up from the team.

The user reported an issue with their heater, which unexpectedly increased temperature during the night, causing them to turn it off. The agent inquired about the urgency and scheduling preferences, with the user indicating mornings are better for a service visit. The call ended after the agent requested a brief description of the heater issue.

Ashley from American Home Shield called to inquire about an appointment update because the technician was late. The agent apologized for the inconvenience and transferred the call to a representative who could provide live updates.

The user, Brittany, called to schedule an AC service appointment for her home at 1335 Highway F, Defiance. The agent confirmed the details and booked an appointment for Friday, May 8, 2026, from noon to 2 PM. The user declined to provide feedback and ended the call.

The user, Mary, was struggling to set up a request on her phone and expressed frustration with the technology. The agent, Sophie, attempted to assist but the conversation was repetitive and did not progress to a resolution. The call ended with the user indicating that the setup was not going to work.
The user called and requested to speak with Cedric Shields. The agent attempted to connect the user to a live agent and successfully transferred the call.

The user, Jean, called to schedule a routine yearly AC tune-up and successfully booked an appointment for the afternoon of May 7th at 2 PM. The agent confirmed the booking and collected positive feedback from the user about the service experience.

Helen Smith called to schedule a plumbing service appointment for no hot water under her American Home Shield home warranty. The agent confirmed the details and noted no dispatch number was provided. Helen declined information about maintenance programs and feedback, and the agent assured that someone would contact her shortly.

The call was initiated by the user but ended abruptly after a brief exchange with the agent, who attempted to engage the user but received minimal response. No specific assistance or service request was made during the call.

Maria called to check on the status of a service appointment for her furnace and air conditioner, which is causing ice formation and flooding in her basement. She emphasized the urgency and that the appointment is scheduled for today, requesting a technician as soon as possible. The agent confirmed the details and transferred the call to a live agent for further assistance.

William called to inquire about the timing of a technician visit to the 8823 location but did not have an appointment on file. The agent confirmed his details but the user decided to call back later and ended the call. No appointment was scheduled during this call.
The user called Budget and expressed interest in parts. The agent asked for more details about the user's needs, but the call ended shortly after without further information.
The call was very brief, with the agent greeting the user and asking how to assist, but the user hung up immediately without responding.
The user called and requested to speak to customer service. The agent acknowledged the request and transferred the call to a live agent successfully.

The user called to inquire about the technician's arrival, expressing frustration over a lack of response after waiting two weeks. The agent apologized and transferred the call to someone who could provide live updates.

The user called to confirm their appointment schedule and did not request any changes or additional information. The agent offered further assistance, but the user declined. The call ended with the user hanging up after confirming no further help was needed.
